name: Irish Vegetables
recipeIngredient: Salt to taste (very little - for me)
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine bay leaf, water, and wine vinegar in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil.
2 Add the vegetables. Simmer until the vegetables are tender.
3 If necessary, drain and remove the bay leaf before serving.
4 Season with salt and pepper to taste.
